name: Paradoxical Realism
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Aliemus and {STR} Generation +[StateArg1]%. After unleashing Exalt, the Final DMG, Shield, and Healing from other Awakeners' Exalts this turn +[StateArg2]%. If this Exalt triggered {Devour}, the wielder gains [StateArg3] Aliemus.
